page_content:
## 5. Dr. Vijay Vaidyanathan (The Department Head)  
**Focus:** Respectful pivot from PhD to MSCS/Medical School.  
**Subject:** Medical School Application & Update: Arian Moridani  
Dear Dr. Vaidyanathan,  
I hope you’re doing well! I often think back to your courses and how you emphasized real-world impact over just theory.  
I wanted to share a quick update: while I considered pursuing a PhD at UNT, I chose to pursue an **M.S. in Computer Science (Machine Learning)** at Georgia Tech to master the data-driven side of medicine. My goal now is to become a physician who can implement AI and big data solutions directly into healthcare—combining the industrial insights from your classes with real patient care.  
I’d really value your support on my medical school application, as you’ve always encouraged me to think about how engineering applies beyond the lab. To make things easy, I’ve set up an **Interfolio** account for a single, seamless upload.  
I’ve attached my **updated CV** and **supporting documents** showing my current work in **Big Data for Health** and **Computer Vision**. Thanks again for being such a strong voice in my academic journey.  
Best regards,  
Arian Moridani
arianmoridani@my.unt.edu
arian.moridani@outlook.com  
---
